title: El Presente de Subjuntivo: When to Use It
summary: The WEIRDO framework (wishes, emotion, impersonal expressions, recommendations, doubt, ojalá) taught as genuine semantic triggers rather than a rote acronym, noun clauses vs. adjective clauses with unknown antecedents vs. a preview of adverbial triggers, the indicative-vs-subjunctive flip under doubt and certainty, and a closing decision-tree synthesis spanning the whole mood-choice system.
